raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no teiwiß etmu es
dsirdejs/ ka tumahki iſtahſtiht/
un Noslehpumus iſfazziht. Nu
tad/ ja tu ſchohs Raſſtus mah-
ki laſſiht/ un tohs man iſtah-
ſtiht/ tad tapſi tu ar Purpuri
apgehrbts/ un ar felta Schke-
dehtm apkahrt tavu Kaklu/ un
buhsi tas trechajs Walditajs
chinni Walſtibā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildēja Daniels/
un ſazzija preeſſch ta Kehnika:
Paturr tawas Dahwanas
preeſſch tewis/ un dohd tawas
Apdahwinafchanas zittain/ es
tatschu tohs Raſtus tam Keh-
niam laſſichu/ un iſtahſtiſchu
wiꞥnam tohs paſchus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kungs Kehniſsch/ Deewṣ
tas augſtakajs irr tawam Teh-
vaim Nebukadnezaram to Wal-
tibu/ un leelu Bubſchanu/Goh-
u un Augſtibu dewis/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Augſtibas deht/
fo wiꞥſch tam bij dewis/ dreb-
eja un trihzeja wiſſi Laudis/
Tautas un Wallozas preeſſch
wiina/ fo wiꞥſch gribbeja/ to
okawe wiꞥſch / un fo wiꞥſch
gribbeja/ patureeja wiꞥſch dsih-
vu/ un fo wiꞥſch gribbeja/ pa-
ugſtinaja wiꞥſch/ un fo wiꞥſch
gribbeja/ paſemmoja wiꞥſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad wiina Sirde
epna mettehs/ un wiina Gars
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch tappe no Zil-
weka Behrneem nostumts/ un
wiina Sirde tappe Lohpeem
lihosa/ un wiina Dsihwofchana
bija pee teem Mescha-Ehſeteem/
un wiꞥſch ehde Sahli ka Wehr-
fchi/ un wiina Meefa tappe no
Debbes Raſtas flazzinata/ tee-
kans wiꞥſch atſinne/ ka tas Wiſ-
ſu-augſtakajś Deewṣ irr par
Walditaju pahr to Zilweku Wal-
stibam/ un eezeſſpahr tahm ku-
ru gribbeiams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu Belsazers wiina
Dehls/ ne eſſi tavu Sirde pa-
ſeminojs/ jepſchu tu to wiſſu
gann labbi eſſi finnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet eſſi tavu Sirde ang-
ſtinajś prett to Debbes Kilngu/
un wiina Namna Rihſi irr D
preeſſch tew atneſti/ un tu un ta-
wi Warrenee/ un tawas See-
wag/ un tawas lekas Seewas
irr Wihnu no teem Dſehrutſchi/
un eſſat tohs Deewus no Su-
draba un Selta/ Warra/ Dsel-
ses/ Rohka un Akmineem fla-
wejſchi/ kas nei reds/ nei dsird/
nei favroht: Bet to Deewu/
funza Rohka tawa Dwafcha irr/
un pee ka wiſſi tavu Zelti stahw/
tu ne eſſi pa-augſtinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad irr tas Rohka Gab-
bals no wiina fuhtihts/ un ſchee
Raſſti eefihmeti tappuſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ſchiß irr tas Raſſts/
Xf 3 tas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
